title: Aconogonon mollifolium
taxonomy: Aconogonon mollifolium is a species of plant in the family Polygonaceae. It is a type of flowering plant commonly found in China. The plant is known to have small leaves and produces white or pink flowers. Aconogonon mollifolium is a relatively rare species and its classification is still being studied by botanists. Further research is needed to determine its exact classification and relationships within the Polygonaceae family.
